CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue, Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Dean Lagoe's motion to change venue to Sacramento County is granted. Per the parties' stipulation, the case is transferred to Sacramento County and Mr. Lagoe shall pay all required transfer fees. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
